gaps.description: Core single-function ask() API with provider/apiKey is fully implemented
Multi-round agent loop (MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS=10) with tool execution is implemented
All four tools (search, code_exec, file_read/write, shell_exec) are implemented and functional
Multi-provider support (Anthropic, OpenAI, custom) is implemented with both baseUrl and customProvider modes
Zero framework concepts maintained (no chain/graph/memory abstractions)
Browser compatibility achieved via agentic-filesystem (IndexedDB/localStorage), quickjs-emscripten, and Pyodide
code_exec supports both JavaScript and Python with automatic language detection
Filesystem injection in code_exec allows AI to use fs.readFileSync/writeFileSync (JS) and open() (Python) naturally
ShellResult type added to AgenticResult interface in types.ts
README.md is minimal (only installation section) - missing API documentation, usage examples, tool descriptions, and quick start guide
PRD.md is stale: describes code_exec as 'executes JS via AsyncFunction' but implementation uses quickjs-emscripten sandbox
PRD.md missing Python support documentation for code_exec
PRD.md AgenticResult doesn't include shellResults field (though types.ts has it)
Node.js Python execution uses child_process/python3 which creates tension with 'no heavy runtime' vision - acceptable tradeoff for Node.js environment
